title: [ImportVerilog] Crash when assignment LHS is a multi-dimensional array concat

features.name: procedural assignment with array concat on LHS
features.description: Code should include a procedural continuous assignment (always_comb) where the left-hand side uses array concatenation syntax to combine multiple unpacked arrays
features.snippet:
logic [7:0][63:0] a, b;
always_comb {a, b} = x;

features.name: multi-dimensional unpacked arrays in concat
features.description: Code should include multi-dimensional unpacked arrays (2D arrays) used in array concatenation expressions

features.name: large packed array to unpacked array assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment from a large packed array (1024 bits) to concatenated unpacked array targets
